perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a split-screen: the left side shows a man pouring multiple sauces on soup dumplings, while the right side shows a woman reacting with a shocked facial expression. (2) The woman, the main character, holds up a package of 'I-Mei Premium Pork Soup Dumplings' and shows the dumplings after being microwaved. (3) She proceeds to recreate the sauce bomb by pouring soy sauce, Suki yaki sauce, mayonnaise, and chili oil over the dumplings in a plastic tray. (4) She uses a spoon to eat the heavily sauced dumplings, showing a transition from a skeptical look to one of genuine surprise and enjoyment. (5) She adds white vinegar to the tray, finishes the meal with a thumbs up, and gestures 'sorry' to the camera with her hands together.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo pop music with a funk bassline starts and continues throughout. A woman's voice is heard speaking in Mandarin with an excited and high-pitched tone. (2) Faint audio from the original video clip (a male voice saying 'Oh my god') is heard briefly in the first few seconds. (3) The music stays consistent as the woman narrating the process. Slurping and chewing sounds are clearly audible during the tasting phase. (4) The music and vocals conclude together as the video ends.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Hook text at the top: '美國人都會這樣吃？醬油炸彈小籠包!!' (Do Americans eat like this? Soy sauce bomb soup dumplings!!). (2) Incremental counters '+1', '+2', '+3' appear as sauces are added. (3) Captions describing the process: '實驗歐膩' (Experiment Oni), '倒到滿' (Pour until full), and '改造中...' (Under renovation/reconstruction). (4) Emotional reaction text: '看起來好死鹹!!!' (Looks so salty!!!) and '真的好吃!!!' (Really delicious!!!). (5) Closing text: '包意思' (A play on words for 'Sorry' or 'My bad').

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook (Viral reaction) -> Preparation (Cooking) -> Tasting -> Final Verdict

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in focus, 1 male creator in the split-screen reaction clip.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, wearing a white pajama-style top with a cartoon print.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A simple indoor setting with a plain beige wall and a white table cluttered with food items and a tumbler.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Challenge -> Execution -> Result -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to verify the palatability of a viral American food trend involving 'sauce-bombed' soup dumplings. The creator uses a popular local brand (I-Mei) to recreate the recipe and provides a subjective review to satisfy the curiosity of her audience regarding whether the high amount of sauce is actually tasty or just a gimmick.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The packaging of I-Mei Premium Pork Soup Dumplings is shown clearly at the beginning and center of the frame as the primary ingredient.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy reaction style, split-screen response, and variety-show style text graphics.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively leverages the 'reaction' trend to drive engagement while performing a product trial that functions as a soft endorsement for a well-known Taiwanese food brand.
